description: Notifi dapp example extracted from the notifi-sdk-ts monorepo at a pinned commit. Used to validate the full-page app generation path where the agent starts from the example app baseline instead of integrating into an existing external app.

setup.notes: Requires a standard Node.js/npm toolchain. The prepared fixture is a clean copy of packages/notifi-dapp-example rather than the full monorepo checkout.

eval_use.what_agent_should_do: Use the prepared copy of packages/notifi-dapp-example as the working app baseline, ask the user for missing tenantId/cardId before implementation, default env to Production unless the user says otherwise, and adapt the app through the appropriate Notifi integration path.
eval_use.success_looks_like: The agent identifies the full-page app path, works in the prepared copy rather than the SDK source tree, asks for missing tenantId/cardId before implementation, defaults env to Production when unspecified, and treats the task as a runnable app workflow instead of snippet-only guidance.
